title: Brad Walker (footballer)
extract:
Bradley Paul Walker (born 25 April 1996) is an English professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for National League club Hartlepool United. He will become a free agent on 30 June 2026.
Walker began his career at Hartlepool United, turning professional in July 2013 and making his first-team debut the following month. He made 123 appearances in all competitions for the club over the next four seasons before joining Crewe Alexandra in July 2017. He spent the 2018–19 season on loan at Wrexham in the National League despite switching from Crewe to Shrewsbury Town in January 2019. Finding first-team games hard to come by in the 2019–20 season, he began 2020–21 in good form before being sidelined with a serious ankle injury. Released by Shrewsbury, he signed with Port Vale in June 2021. He spent 18 months with the club before being sold to Tranmere Rovers in January 2023. He rejoined Hartlepool United, now playing non-League football, in June 2025.
